title: Post-16 qualifications at level 3 and below for the 2025 to 2026 academic year
body: "This guidance is for:   education providers awarding organisations   It aims to give an update on:   post-16 qualifications reform at level 3, following the Secretary of State’s review of qualifications due to have public funding removed the next phase of reforms, including the routes and subjects where we will approve new level 3 qualifications for delivery from 1 August 2026   Awarding organisations should also refer to the qualifications funding manual. "

taxons.title: Further and higher education courses and qualifications
